versions.version_description: I find this to be more correct than the one other five-star submission on the site.

Christmas song guitar chords never match the melody. So after years of making a mess of this song, I pulled the vocal sheet music and matched the melody to real guitar chords. I think you'll find this version very satisfiing and more fun to play.
This tab has more precise chords and has a jazzy, bouncy feel.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
SONG: Jingle Bell Rock
ARTIST: Bobby Helms

[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
